commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds load-time Gateway session-store recovery from validated .bak/.tmp artifacts, self-heals sessions.json with 0o600, and adds recovery tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main falls back to an empty store for empty/corrupted/non-object sessions.json, and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/77783 provides a concrete 0-byte sessions.json incident.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can add the missing fs-safe default temp candidate and regression coverage without a product decision.

target.title: fix(sessions): recover session store from bak/tmp after corrupted write
target.author: wangbyg

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: wAngByg
commands.command: re-review — updated pr body with fs-safe temp artifact support. all review findings addressed: - [p2] hot-path .bak creation → removed - [p2] tmp cap before ranking → fixed (sourcerank desc, then mtime desc, then cap) - [p2] self-heal 0o600 → fixed (opensync 0o600 + chmodsync before rename) - [p2] include fs-safe temp artifacts → fixed (scanner now accepts both legacy and .fs-safe-replace.*.tmp) - [p2] fresh tmp fallback → fixed (sourcerank=1, lowest priority) - [p3] changelog → added - [p3] test structure → cleaned (25 tests, all inside describe) temp artifact coverage: - legacy/self-heal: sessions.json.<uuid>.tmp - fs-safe atomic replace: .fs-safe-replace.<pid>.<uuid>.tmp test coverage: 25 tests (23 original + 2 new fs-safe regression tests) ci: real behavior proof success, all checks pass. commit: d4981291
commands.freeform_prompt: re-review — updated PR body with fs-safe temp artifact support. All review findings addressed: - [P2] Hot-path .bak creation → REMOVED - [P2] tmp cap before ranking → FIXED (sourceRank desc, then mtime desc, then cap) - [P2] Self-heal 0o600 → FIXED (openSync 0o600 + chmodSync before rename) - [P2] Include fs-safe temp artifacts → FIXED (scanner now accepts both legacy and .fs-safe-replace.*.tmp) - [P2] Fresh tmp fallback → FIXED (sourceRank=1, lowest priority) - [P3] CHANGELOG → ADDED - [P3] Test structure → CLEANED (25 tests, all inside describe) Temp artifact coverage: - Legacy/self-heal: sessions.json.<uuid>.tmp - fs-safe atomic replace: .fs-safe-replace.<pid>.<uuid>.tmp Test coverage: 25 tests (23 original + 2 new fs-safe regression tests) CI: Real behavior proof SUCCESS, all checks PASS. Commit: d4981291
